calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-029 Committed vs Ablated Gate -- Harm Outcomes (2x2)
items.description: 2x2: [gate_active / gate_ablated] x [stable (drift=0.0) / volatile (drift=0.4, interval=3)]. Train 2 agents (seeds 0,1) on standard env. Gate ablation: force running_variance > commit_threshold before each SELECT step. PASS: harm_gap_stable > 0 (committed better in stable), harm_gap_volatile < harm_gap_stable (advantage narrows in volatile), ablation complete (no committed steps when ablated).

items.title: MECH-104 Harm-Surprise Spike -- Route-2 Validation
items.description: Route-2 MECH-104: spike fires on UNEXPECTED harm (|actual - predicted| > threshold), not on expected harm. Two conditions: A = surprise-gated spike on committed unexpected harm steps; B = no-spike baseline. PASS: A shows variance increase on unexpected harm (delta_var_unexpected > 0.005), A does not spike on expected harm (delta_var_expected < 0.002), B stays flat. EXQ-061 validated Route-1 (any harm contact). This validates the surprise-selectivity of Route-2.

items.title: MECH-104 Surprise-Gated Volatility Interrupt -- spike selectivity C4 fix
items.description: EXQ-062a FAIL: C4 measured uncommitted duration (wrong). EXQ-062b fixes C4 to measure spike count selectivity (C4a: surprise_n_spikes < always_n_spikes) and per-spike impact (C4b: surprise_per_spike >= always_per_spike x 0.90). EXQ-062a data showed 215 surprise vs 229 always spikes (C4a would PASS) and 10.7 vs 6.7 uncommitted/spike (C4b would PASS). Script otherwise identical to EXQ-062a.

items.title: MECH-026 Ready Vigilance -- beta_gate elevation during uncommitted threat steps
items.description: Two-condition: threat-present (hazard_density=0.3) vs neutral (hazard_density=0.0), matched seeds. Measures readiness_gap = beta_gate elevation during uncommitted threat steps vs neutral uncommitted steps. PASS: C1 readiness_gap>0.005, C2 threat_commitment_rate < neutral*1.5, C3 uncommitted_threat_steps>=20, C4 harm_pred_std>0.01, C5 no fatal errors.

items.title: MECH-047 Mode Manager Hysteresis -- post-commitment inertia after incentive removal
items.description: Two-agent design: Agent H (Phase A 200 high-hazard + Phase B 100 low-hazard + 50 eval) vs Control C (100 low-hazard + 50 eval). Measures hysteresis_decay_steps and beta_gate_post_commit_mean. PASS: C1 hysteresis_decay_steps>20, C2 beta_gate_post_commit_mean>control*1.1, C3 commitment_rate_phase_a>0.3, C4 no fatal errors.

items.title: MECH-029 Default Mode Probe -- z_world variance higher during uncommitted steps
items.description: Single-condition. 500 train + 100 eval episodes. Labels each eval step committed/uncommitted via running_variance vs calibrated threshold. Measures z_world variance and E3 running_variance by mode. PASS: C1 uncommitted_z_world_var > committed*1.1, C2 uncommitted_e3_var > committed*1.05, C3 both modes observed (>=20 steps each), C4 harm_pred_std>0.01, C5 no fatal errors.

items.title: MECH-089 Theta Batching -- E3 noise reduced when sampling batched E1 updates
items.description: Two conditions matched seeds: Condition A theta_buffer_size=4 (batched, E3 samples every 4 E1 steps) vs Condition B theta_buffer_size=1 (raw, every step). Measures e3_prediction_error variance. PASS: C1 e3_error_batched < e3_error_raw*0.90, C2 e1_per_e3_batched>=3, C3 harm_pred_std_batched>0.01, C4 harm_pred_std_raw>0.01, C5 no fatal errors.

items.title: ARC-007 Path Memory Ablation (Proper) -- residue field zeroing degrades hippocampal proposals
items.description: Re-run of V3-EXQ-046b (infrastructure ERROR: SIGTERM during print, not a script bug). Prerequisite: EXQ-042 PASS. Tests ARC-007 STRICT (Q-020): hippocampal proposals are value-flat, relying entirely on residue field geometry. Protocol: P1 train (600 eps), P2 eval intact, P3 ablate (zero residue field via monkeypatch), P4 eval ablated, P5 restore, P6 eval restored. PASS: C1 hippo_quality_gap_intact>0, C2 ablated<=intact*0.5, C3 restored>=ablated, C4 cal_gap_approach>0.03, C5 no errors.

items.title: MECH-098 Reafference Event Selectivity Pair -- ON vs OFF discriminative pair
items.description: Discriminative pair: REAFFERENCE_ON (SD-007 enabled) vs REAFFERENCE_OFF (disabled), both alpha_world=0.9, seeds 42 and 7. Primary discriminator (pre-registered): event_selectivity_delta = margin(ON) - margin(OFF) where margin = mean(||delta_z_world|| on event steps) - mean(||delta_z_world|| on loco steps). PASS: C1 delta>=0.01 (MECH-098 core claim), C2 reafference_r2>0.20, C3 margin_OFF>0, C4 min event steps>=10. Decision: retain_ree/hybridize/retire_ree_claim. Addresses EXP-0001/EVB-0001 active_conflict deadline 2026-03-25.
